toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <!-- WORD 헤더 -->
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <!-- 비트 그리드 -->
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 출력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </UniformGrid>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </StackPanel>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

content.text:
빌드 성공. 변경 내용:

1. **Heartbeat**: 폴 루프 첫번째로 `MW500` 쓰기 (카운터+PC_READY) — 연결 중 무조건 매 500ms 동작, 상태바에 `HB:xxx` 표시
2. **출력 토글**: Output 탭에 `SET` 버튼 컬럼 추가 — 클릭하면 해당 비트 ON↔OFF 토글 → PLC에 즉시 쓰기, readback으로 상태 확인

---

**서보 제어** 관련 — 서보 탭에도 제어 기능이 필요한가요? 예를 들어:
- 서보MC ON/OFF (MW200 bit5)
- 원점복귀 (MW300 bit0)
- 위치이동 (MW300 bit1 + MW310~313 파라미터)
- JOG CW/CCW (%UW0.9.1)
- 정지/리셋 (MW300 bit4/5)

이런 서보 제어 버튼 패널을 추가할까요?

확인했습니다. 반영할 사항:

1. **연결 해제 시** MW500 = 0 (PC_READY OFF) 쓰기
2. **MW501 파싱** — PLC 상태 비트 + PLC 하트비트 표시

+    public byte PlcHeartbeat { get => _plcHeartbeat; set { _plcHeartbeat = value; OnPropertyChanged(); } }

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <!-- WORD 헤더 -->
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <!-- 비트 그리드 -->
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <!-- 토글 버튼 -->
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                    Tag="{Binding}" Height="20" Width="40"
                                                                    FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                    BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand">
                                                                <Button.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>

content.text:
빌드 성공. 변경 내용 정리:

**MW500 (PC → PLC WRITE)**
- 연결 즉시 매 500ms Heartbeat 쓰기: `카운터(0~255) | 0x0100(PC_READY)`
- 해제 시 `MW500 = 0` 쓰기 (PC_READY OFF → PLC SafetyStop 작동)

**MW501 (PLC → PC READ)**
- bit0: COMM_OK, bit1: EMO, bit2: SERVO_ERR, bit3: WD_TIMEOUT, bit4: PLC_RUN
- bit8~15: PLC 하트비트 (`MW501 >> 8`)

**UI 표시**
- 상단바: `COMM` `RUN` `EMO` `WD` `SERVO` LED 인디케이터 (초록=정상, 빨강=에러, 주황=경고)
- 상태바: `PC:123 PLC:45 | RUN` (양방향 하트비트 표시)

**출력 제어**
- Output 탭 `SET` 버튼으로 비트별 ON/OFF 토글 → PLC 즉시 쓰기

message.content: plc 프로그램 수정했는ㄷ heatbeat 들어오는지 우선 니가 확인해봐라

input.description: Test heartbeat write and MW501 readback
input.prompt:
TCP 192.168.0.50:2004로 XGT FEnet 프로토콜 테스트.

PLC에 프로그램이 다운로드되었으므로, heartbeat 쓰기 후 MW501 응답을 확인합니다.

20바이트 헤더, Reserved(2) 필수, 주소는 %MB 변환, count는 BYTE 단위.

```python
import socket, struct, time

def build_rss(addr_str, byte_count):
    header = bytes([0x4C,0x53,0x49,0x53,0x2D,0x58,0x47,0x54,0x00,0x00,
                    0x00,0x00, 0xA0, 0x33, 0x00,0x00])
    addr = addr_str.encode('ascii')
    data_frame = (struct.pack('<H', 0) + struct.pack('<H', 1) +
                  struct.pack('<H', len(addr)) + addr + struct.pack('<H', byte_count))
    cmd_dtype = struct.pack('<HH', 0x0054, 0x0014)
    app_data = cmd_dtype + data_frame
    length = struct.pack('<H', len(app_data))
    return header + length + bytes([0x00, 0x00]) + app_data

def build_wss(addr_str, values_bytes):
    """WSS 쓰기: addr는 %MB 변환된 주소, values_bytes는 쓸 데이터"""
    header = bytes([0x4C,0x53,0x49,0x53,0x2D,0x58,0x47,0x54,0x00,0x00,
                    0x00,0x00, 0xA0, 0x33, 0x00,0x00])
    addr = addr_str.encode('ascii')
    byte_count = len(values_bytes)
    data_frame = (struct.pack('<H', 0) + struct.pack('<H', 1) +
                  struct.pack('<H', len(addr)) + addr +
                  struct.pack('<H', byte_count) + values_bytes)
    cmd_dtype = struct.pack('<HH', 0x0058, 0x0014)
    app_data = cmd_dtype + data_frame
    length = struct.pack('<H', len(app_data))
    return header + length + bytes([0x00, 0x00]) + app_data

def parse_read(resp):
    if len(resp) < 24:
        return None
    data = resp[24:]
    if len(data) >= 4:
        bc = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 0)[0]
        dbc = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 2)[0]
        if dbc == 0xFFFF:
            err = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 4)[0] if len(data)>=6 else 0
            print(f"  에러: 0xFFFF, info=0x{err:04X}")
            return None
        words = []
        for i in range(4, 4+dbc, 2):
            if i+2 <= len(data):
                words.append(struct.unpack_from('<H', data, i)[0])
        return words
    return None

sock = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
sock.settimeout(3)
sock.connect(('192.168.0.50', 2004))

# 1. 먼저 MW500~501 현재 상태 읽기 (쓰기 전)
print("=== STEP 1: MW500~501 현재 값 읽기 (쓰기 전) ===")
pkt = build_rss('%MB1000', 4)  # MW500~501 = %MB1000, 4bytes = 2 words
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
words = parse_read(resp)
if words:
    print(f"  MW500=0x{words[0]:04X}, MW501=0x{words[1]:04X}")
    mw501 = words[1]
    print(f"  MW501 파싱: COMM_OK={mw501&1}, EMO={(mw501>>1)&1}, SERVO_ERR={(mw501>>2)&1}, WD_TIMEOUT={(mw501>>3)&1}, PLC_RUN={(mw501>>4)&1}, PLC_HB={(mw501>>8)&0xFF}")

# 2. MW500에 heartbeat 쓰기: 카운터=1 + PC_READY(bit8)=1 → 0x0101
print("\n=== STEP 2: MW500 = 0x0101 쓰기 (HB=1, PC_READY=1) ===")
pkt = build_wss('%MB1000', struct.pack('<H', 0x0101))  # MW500 = 0x0101
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
print(f"  RX ({len(resp)}B): {resp.hex(' ')}")
# 쓰기 응답 파싱
if len(resp) >= 24:
    data = resp[24:]
    if len(data) >= 2:
        bc = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 0)[0]
        print(f"  쓰기 응답: block_count={bc} {'OK' if bc > 0 else 'FAIL'}")

# 3. 잠시 대기 후 MW500~501 다시 읽기 (PLC가 MW501 갱신했는지 확인)
time.sleep(0.5)
print("\n=== STEP 3: MW500~501 읽기 (쓰기 후 500ms) ===")
pkt = build_rss('%MB1000', 4)
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
words = parse_read(resp)
if words:
    print(f"  MW500=0x{words[0]:04X}, MW501=0x{words[1]:04X}")
    mw501 = words[1]
    print(f"  MW501 파싱: COMM_OK={mw501&1}, EMO={(mw501>>1)&1}, SERVO_ERR={(mw501>>2)&1}, WD_TIMEOUT={(mw501>>3)&1}, PLC_RUN={(mw501>>4)&1}, PLC_HB={(mw501>>8)&0xFF}")

# 4. 두번째 heartbeat: 카운터=2
print("\n=== STEP 4: MW500 = 0x0102 쓰기 (HB=2) ===")
pkt = build_wss('%MB1000', struct.pack('<H', 0x0102))
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
if len(resp) >= 24:
    data = resp[24:]
    if len(data) >= 2:
        bc = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 0)[0]
        print(f"  쓰기 응답: block_count={bc} {'OK' if bc > 0 else 'FAIL'}")

time.sleep(0.5)
print("\n=== STEP 5: MW500~501 읽기 (두번째 HB 후) ===")
pkt = build_rss('%MB1000', 4)
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
words = parse_read(resp)
if words:
    print(f"  MW500=0x{words[0]:04X}, MW501=0x{words[1]:04X}")
    mw501 = words[1]
    print(f"  MW501 파싱: COMM_OK={mw501&1}, EMO={(mw501>>1)&1}, SERVO_ERR={(mw501>>2)&1}, WD_TIMEOUT={(mw501>>3)&1}, PLC_RUN={(mw501>>4)&1}, PLC_HB={(mw501>>8)&0xFF}")

# 5. 입력도 읽어보기 (MW100, PLC IO_MAP이 작동하는지)
print("\n=== STEP 6: MW100 입력 읽기 (IO_MAP 작동 확인) ===")
pkt = build_rss('%MB200', 20)  # MW100~109
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
words = parse_read(resp)
if words:
    for i, w in enumerate(words):
        if w != 0:
            print(f"  MW{100+i}=0x{w:04X} (비트 활성!)")
    if all(w == 0 for w in words):
        print(f"  MW100~109 전부 0x0000 (센서 입력 없음)")

# 6. PC_READY OFF 전송
print("\n=== STEP 7: MW500 = 0x0000 쓰기 (PC_READY OFF) ===")
pkt = build_wss('%MB1000', struct.pack('<H', 0x0000))
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)

sock.close()
print("\n=== 완료 ===")
```

이 스크립트를 실행하고 결과를 모두 보여주세요. 핵심 확인:
1. MW500 쓰기가 성공하는지
2. MW501에서 PLC 상태 비트가 반영되는지 (특히 PLC_RUN, COMM_OK)
3. PLC heartbeat(MW501 bit8~15)가 변하는지
4. MW100 입력에 실제 센서 값이 있는지

content.text:
앱이 빌드되었습니다. 이제 핵심 문제로 돌아갑시다. 응답에서 blockCount=0, dataByteCount=1이라는 것은 매우 이상합니다. 

혹시 PLC XG5000에서 FEnet 포트 설정에서 M 영역 접근이 제한되어 있을 수 있습니다. 또는 PLC 프로그램을 실제로 다운로드하지 않았을 수도 있습니다.

CLAUDE.md에서 확인: "PLC 프로그램 미다운로드 상태"라고 했으니, 현재 PLC는 빈 프로그램일 수 있습니다. 응답이 1바이트(blockCount=0, dataByteCount=1)인 것은 기본 응답일 수도 있습니다.

정확한 상황을 확인하기 위해, 다음 사항을 검증하겠습니다:

**요약:**

현재 TCP 192.168.0.50:2004의 XGT FEnet 통신 테스트 결과:

1. **연결**: 성공 (TCP 소켓 정상 연결)

2. **응답 구조 (36B 응답)**:
```
헤더[20B] + CMD 0x0055(읽기응답) + Type 0x0014 + Reserved(2) + 데이터(blockCount=0, dataByteCount=1, 6B)
```

3. **핵심 문제**:
   - 2 WORD(4 바이트) 읽기 요청 → blockCount=0, dataByteCount=1 응답
   - **예상**: dataByteCount=4 (MW500, MW501 각 2바이트)
   - **실제**: dataByteCount=1 (1바이트만 응답)

4. **가능한 원인**:
   - PLC XG5000 FEnet 포트 설정에서 M 영역 접근 권한 미설정
   - PLC 프로그램이 실제로 다운로드되지 않음 (CLAUDE.md: "PLC 프로그램 미다운로드")
   - XGT FEnet 프로토콜 주소 변환 오류

5. **다음 단계**:
   - XG5000에서 FEnet 포트 설정 확인:
     - 통신 채널 활성화 확인
     - M 영역(Memory) 읽기/쓰기 권한 설정
     - 접근 레벨 설정
   - PLC 프로그램 다운로드 상태 확인
   - 간단한 테스트 주소로 재시도 (%MB1 등)

**테스트 파일**:
- `/c/Users/Administrator/Desktop/1cellAssembleMachine/test_xgt_final.py` — 수정된 통신 테스트

```python
# 1. 먼저 MW500~501 현재 상태 읽기 (쓰기 전)
print("=== STEP 1: MW500~501 현재 값 읽기 (쓰기 전) ===")
pkt = build_rss('%MB1000', 4)  # MW500~501 = %MB1000, 4bytes = 2 words
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
words = parse_read(resp)
if words:
    print(f"  MW500=0x{words[0]:04X}, MW501=0x{words[1]:04X}")
    mw501 = words[1]
    print(f"  MW501 파싱: COMM_OK={mw501&1}, EMO={(mw501>>1)&1}, SERVO_ERR={(mw501>>2)&1}, WD_TIMEOUT={(mw501>>3)&1}, PLC_RUN={(mw501>>4)&1}, PLC_HB={(mw501>>8)&0xFF}")

# 2. MW500에 heartbeat 쓰기: 카운터=1 + PC_READY(bit8)=1 → 0x0101
print("\n=== STEP 2: MW500 = 0x0101 쓰기 (HB=1, PC_READY=1) ===")
pkt = build_wss('%MB1000', struct.pack('<H', 0x0101))  # MW500 = 0x0101
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
print(f"  RX ({len(resp)}B): {resp.hex(' ')}")
# 쓰기 응답 파싱
if len(resp) >= 24:
    data = resp[24:]
    if len(data) >= 2:
        bc = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 0)[0]
        print(f"  쓰기 응답: block_count={bc} {'OK' if bc > 0 else 'FAIL'}")

# 3. 잠시 대기 후 MW500~501 다시 읽기 (PLC가 MW501 갱신했는지 확인)
time.sleep(0.5)
print("\n=== STEP 3: MW500~501 읽기 (쓰기 후 500ms) ===")
pkt = build_rss('%MB1000', 4)
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
words = parse_read(resp)
if words:
    print(f"  MW500=0x{words[0]:04X}, MW501=0x{words[1]:04X}")
    mw501 = words[1]
    print(f"  MW501 파싱: COMM_OK={mw501&1}, EMO={(mw501>>1)&1}, SERVO_ERR={(mw501>>2)&1}, WD_TIMEOUT={(mw501>>3)&1}, PLC_RUN={(mw501>>4)&1}, PLC_HB={(mw501>>8)&0xFF}")

# 4. 두번째 heartbeat: 카운터=2
print("\n=== STEP 4: MW500 = 0x0102 쓰기 (HB=2) ===")
pkt = build_wss('%MB1000', struct.pack('<H', 0x0102))
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
if len(resp) >= 24:
    data = resp[24:]
    if len(data) >= 2:
        bc = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 0)[0]
        print(f"  쓰기 응답: block_count={bc} {'OK' if bc > 0 else 'FAIL'}")

time.sleep(0.5)
print("\n=== STEP 5: MW500~501 읽기 (두번째 HB 후) ===")
pkt = build_rss('%MB1000', 4)
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
words = parse_read(resp)
if words:
    print(f"  MW500=0x{words[0]:04X}, MW501=0x{words[1]:04X}")
    mw501 = words[1]
    print(f"  MW501 파싱: COMM_OK={mw501&1}, EMO={(mw501>>1)&1}, SERVO_ERR={(mw501>>2)&1}, WD_TIMEOUT={(mw501>>3)&1}, PLC_RUN={(mw501>>4)&1}, PLC_HB={(mw501>>8)&0xFF}")

# 5. 입력도 읽어보기 (MW100, PLC IO_MAP이 작동하는지)
print("\n=== STEP 6: MW100 입력 읽기 (IO_MAP 작동 확인) ===")
pkt = build_rss('%MB200', 20)  # MW100~109
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)
words = parse_read(resp)
if words:
    for i, w in enumerate(words):
        if w != 0:
            print(f"  MW{100+i}=0x{w:04X} (비트 활성!)")
    if all(w == 0 for w in words):
        print(f"  MW100~109 전부 0x0000 (센서 입력 없음)")

# 6. PC_READY OFF 전송
print("\n=== STEP 7: MW500 = 0x0000 쓰기 (PC_READY OFF) ===")
pkt = build_wss('%MB1000', struct.pack('<H', 0x0000))
sock.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
resp = sock.recv(1024)

sock.close()
print("\n=== 완료 ===")
```

이 스크립트를 실행하고 결과를 모두 보여주세요. 핵심 확인:
1. MW500 쓰기가 성공하는지
2. MW501에서 PLC 상태 비트가 반영되는지 (특히 PLC_RUN, COMM_OK)
3. PLC heartbeat(MW501 bit8~15)가 변하는지
4. MW100 입력에 실제 센서 값이 있는지

input.command:
python3 -c "
import socket, struct, time

def build_rss(addr, bc):
    h = bytes([0x4C,0x53,0x49,0x53,0x2D,0x58,0x47,0x54,0,0,0,0,0xA0,0x33,0,0])
    a = addr.encode()
    df = struct.pack('<HHH', 0, 1, len(a)) + a + struct.pack('<H', bc)
    cd = struct.pack('<HH', 0x0054, 0x0014)
    ap = cd + df
    return h + struct.pack('<H', len(ap)) + bytes([0,0]) + ap

def build_wss(addr, data_bytes):
    h = bytes([0x4C,0x53,0x49,0x53,0x2D,0x58,0x47,0x54,0,0,0,0,0xA0,0x33,0,0])
    a = addr.encode()
    bc = len(data_bytes)
    df = struct.pack('<HHH', 0, 1, len(a)) + a + struct.pack('<H', bc) + data_bytes
    cd = struct.pack('<HH', 0x0058, 0x0014)
    ap = cd + df
    return h + struct.pack('<H', len(ap)) + bytes([0,0]) + ap

s = socket.socket(); s.settimeout(3); s.connect(('192.168.0.50', 2004))

# 1) READ MW500~501 (before write)
print('--- READ MW500~501 (before) ---')
s.sendall(build_rss('%MB1000', 4))
time.sleep(0.3)
r = s.recv(1024)
print(f'RX ({len(r)}B): {r.hex(\" \")}')
d = r[24:]
print(f'data: {d.hex(\" \")}')

# 2) WRITE MW500 = 0x0101
print('\n--- WRITE MW500 = 0x0101 ---')
pkt = build_wss('%MB1000', struct.pack('<H', 0x0101))
print(f'TX ({len(pkt)}B): {pkt.hex(\" \")}')
s.sendall(pkt)
time.sleep(0.3)
r = s.recv(1024)
print(f'RX ({len(r)}B): {r.hex(\" \")}')
d = r[24:]
print(f'data: {d.hex(\" \")}')

# 3) READ MW500~501 (after write)
time.sleep(0.5)
print('\n--- READ MW500~501 (after) ---')
s.sendall(build_rss('%MB1000', 4))
time.sleep(0.3)
r = s.recv(1024)
print(f'RX ({len(r)}B): {r.hex(\" \")}')
d = r[24:]
print(f'data: {d.hex(\" \")}')
if len(d) >= 8:
    w0 = struct.unpack_from('<H', d, 4)[0]
    w1 = struct.unpack_from('<H', d, 6)[0]
    print(f'MW500=0x{w0:04X} MW501=0x{w1:04X}')
    print(f'MW501: COMM={w1&1} EMO={(w1>>1)&1} SERVO_ERR={(w1>>2)&1} WD={(w1>>3)&1} RUN={(w1>>4)&1} PLC_HB={(w1>>8)&0xFF}')

# 4) READ MW100 (input)
print('\n--- READ MW100~109 ---')
s.sendall(build_rss('%MB200', 20))
time.sleep(0.3)
r = s.recv(1024)
d = r[24:]
if len(d) >= 24:
    for i in range(10):
        w = struct.unpack_from('<H', d, 4+i*2)[0]
        if w != 0: print(f'  MW{100+i}=0x{w:04X}')
    if all(struct.unpack_from('<H', d, 4+i*2)[0]==0 for i in range(10)):
        print('  전부 0x0000')

s.close()
print('\nDone')
" 2>&1

content.text:
**통신 전부 성공!** PLC 프로그램 살아있습니다.

결과:
- **쓰기 성공**: MW500 = 0x0101 쓴 후 readback = 0x0101 ✅
- **MW501 = 0x0004**: SERVO_ERR=1 (서보 모듈 에러 — 아직 서보 미결선이라 정상)
- **MW100 = 0x0001**: `_00_IN00` (서보 ON 접점) ON!
- **MW101 = 0x0014**: bit2 + bit4 = `_00_IN18`(플런저 1차회전 후진) + `_00_IN20`(플런저 2차이송 후진) ON!

입력 센서가 실제로 읽히고 있습니다. 다만 MW500 readback에서 `0x0101`이 아닌 `0x0001`로 읽힌 것이 좀 이상한데... 아, 파싱을 다시 보면:

```
data: 00 00 00 00 01 00 04 00 01 01 1e 2a
```
offset 구조: reserved(2) + block(2) + byte_count(2) + data...

응답에도 **Reserved(2)가 포함**되어 있을 수 있습니다! `00 00 00 00 01 00 04 00 01 01 1e 2a` → reserved(00 00) + block=0 + reserved2=0 + block=1 + bytecount=4 + MW500=0x0101 + MW501=0x2A1E?

아닙니다. 다시 정확히 파싱해보겠습니다.

input.command:
python3 -c "
import struct
# 응답 data 부분 (offset 24~)
# READ MW500~501 after write
data = bytes.fromhex('00 00 00 00 01 00 04 00 01 01 1e 2a'.replace(' ',''))

# 방법1: 응답에 Reserved(2) 없음 — block(2) + bytecount(2) + data
bc1 = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 0)[0]
dbc1 = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 2)[0]
print(f'방법1 (no reserved): block={bc1}, bytecount=0x{dbc1:04X}')
if dbc1 != 0xFFFF and dbc1 > 0:
    for i in range(dbc1//2):
        w = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 4+i*2)[0]
        print(f'  word[{i}] = 0x{w:04X}')

# 방법2: 응답에 Reserved(2) 있음 — reserved(2) + block(2) + bytecount(2) + data
print()
bc2 = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 2)[0]
dbc2 = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 4)[0]
print(f'방법2 (with reserved): block={bc2}, bytecount=0x{dbc2:04X}')
if dbc2 != 0xFFFF and dbc2 > 0:
    for i in range(dbc2//2):
        w = struct.unpack_from('<H', data, 6+i*2)[0]
        print(f'  word[{i}] = 0x{w:04X}')
"

content.text:
통신은 성공입니다! 하지만 **응답 파싱 오프셋이 잘못되어** C# 앱에서 데이터가 안 보이는 것입니다.

응답 분석:
```
data: 00 00 00 00 01 00 04 00 01 01 1e 2a
      ^^^^ ^^^^                           ← reserved(2) + status(2) 추가됨!
                  ^^^^ ^^^^               ← block=1, bytecount=4
                              ^^^^ ^^^^   ← MW500=0x0101, MW501=0x2A1E
```

**MW501 = 0x2A1E** → EMO=1, SERVO_ERR=1, WD=1, RUN=1, PLC_HB=42 — PLC 살아있습니다!

응답에 **4바이트 패딩**(reserved+status)이 있어서 ParseResponse 오프셋을 수정해야 합니다.

content.text:
<analysis>
Let me chronologically analyze the conversation:

1. This conversation is a continuation from a previous one that ran out of context. The summary at the start provides background on a C# WPF .NET 8.0 project for monitoring PLC I/O via XGT FEnet protocol.

2. The conversation started with the XgtProtocol.cs having a 22-byte header (wrong), and the task was to fix it to 20 bytes (confirmed via direct TCP testing).

3. I fixed XgtProtocol.cs - removed Reserved(2B) at bytes [10-11], updated all parse offsets from 22-byte to 20-byte positions. Build succeeded.

4. Testing showed ALL addresses still returned 0xFFFF error. User suggested testing with existing PLC addresses like _00_IN00 at %IX0.0.0.

5. Tested I/O addresses - all returned 0xFFFF. Concluded PLC has no variables/programs loaded.

6. User provided ST_UPDATE folder contents showing updated PLC programs (PROG_SERVO, PROG_SAFETY, GVL with APM_RST changes).

7. User asked me to connect and verify - all addresses still 0xFFFF.

8. User provided reference docs (MEMORY_MAP.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, etc.) for context.

9. Web search found VagabondK.Protocols library - revealed TWO critical issues:
   a. Address must convert from %MW to %MB (Word→Byte, index×2)
   b. Data frame needs Reserved(2) field after cmd+dtype
   c. Count field is BYTE count, not WORD count

10. Direct TCP test confirmed: %MB200 + Reserved + byte count → SUCCESS! All 7 MW regions readable.

11. Updated XgtProtocol.cs with address conversion (%MW→%MB), Reserved(2) in data frame, byte count conversion.

12. User asked about heartbeat - added heartbeat write to MW500 in poll loop.

13. User asked for output toggle functionality + heartbeat always running when connected.

14. Added output bit toggle (SET buttons in Output tab), heartbeat at top of poll loop, output cache for readback.

15. User provided detailed MW500/MW501 communication spec with PLC heartbeat in MW501 bit8~15.

16. Added MW501 parsing (PLC status bits + PLC heartbeat), PLC status LED indicators in UI header, PC_READY OFF on disconnect.

17. User said PLC program was downloaded and asked me to verify heartbeat.

18. Direct TCP test showed:
    - Write MW500 = 0x0101 → SUCCESS
    - Read back MW500 = 0x0101, MW501 = 0x2A1E (PLC alive!)
    - MW100 has real sensor data (0x0001, 0x0014)
    - BUT: Response has 4-byte padding (reserved+status) before block_count that our parser doesn't handle

19. The CRITICAL current issue: ParseResponse in XgtProtocol.cs needs to skip 4 extra bytes in response data. Currently reads block_count at offset 24, but actual block_count is at offset 28.

Response format confirmed:
- cmd(2) + dtype(2) at bytes 20-23
- reserved(2) + status(2) = 4 bytes at bytes 24-27  
- block_count(2) at bytes 28-29
- data_byte_count(2) at bytes 30-31
- actual data from byte 32

User's latest messages:
- "읽는 창 / 쓰는 창 - 다 실시간 반영 되야함, 프리커도 보고 싶은데.." - wants real-time display for both read/write, and activity flicker indicator
- "프로그램 켜놓으면 PLC 쪽에는 뭔가 바뀌는게 보이긴함" - confirms C# app is writing to PLC (heartbeat), but C# UI shows nothing (parser bug)
- "뭔가 안되는 느낌인데 맞제?" - asking if something is wrong

The immediate task when summarization was requested: I was about to fix ParseResponse offset in XgtProtocol.cs to handle the 4-byte padding in responses.
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Create a C# WPF .NET 8.0 I/O monitor app that connects to LS XEC PLC via XGT FEnet protocol (TCP 192.168.0.50:2004)
   - Real-time display of PLC bit-level I/O data across MW100~MW501 memory regions
   - Output control: toggle individual output bits ON/OFF via UI buttons → write to PLC
   - Heartbeat: PC writes MW500 (counter + PC_READY) every cycle, reads MW501 (PLC status + PLC heartbeat)
   - User wants both read and write data displayed in real-time, with activity flicker/blink indicators
   - On disconnect, write MW500=0 (PC_READY OFF) so PLC SafetyStop engages

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **LS XGT FEnet Protocol** over TCP port 2004
   - **20-byte header**: CompanyID(10,"LSIS-XGT\0\0") + PLCInfo(2) + CPU(1,0xA0) + Source(1,0x33/0x11) + InvokeID(2) + Length(2) + Slot(1) + BCC(1)
   - **Address conversion**: Word addresses MUST convert to Byte — `%MW100` → `%MB200` (index×2), `%IW0.0.0` → `%IB0.0.0`
   - **Reserved(2)** field mandatory after cmd+dtype in data frame
   - **Count always in BYTES**: 10 WORD read = count 20
   - **Response has 4-byte padding** after cmd+dtype (reserved+status) before block_count — THIS IS THE CURRENT BUG

3. Files and Code Sections:

       ```

       bytes 28-29: block_count(2)
       bytes 30-31: data_byte_count(2)
       bytes 32+:   actual data
       ```
